description.value: Living creatures are the challenge you have been building toward. Infusing a person directly requires understanding both the material and the vital simultaneously.

system.benefits:
You may now use Imbue Item on a willing creature you touch rather than only on objects. Living infusions grant one of the following effects for 1 minute:

  • Fortified Flesh: Target gains +4 DR and resistance to one energy type of your choice
  • Empowered Strike: Target's weapon and unarmed attacks deal +[[/damage 4 type=elemental]] damage of your chosen type on every hit for the duration
  • Accelerated Healing: At the start of each of the target's turns, they regain HP equal to your Intelligence score

usage.text: Uses one Imbue Item charge; touch required; willing creatures only
